code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
let n = lines.len()
mut i = 0
let last = n - 1
while i < n
  let line = lines.get(i)
  match line
  when Some(s)
    if i == last and string.is_empty(s)
      print("")
    else
      let num = i + 1
      println("#{num}: #{s}")
    end
  when None
    print("")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
